Muje is saal Haram ya Nabawi mein I'tikaf karne ka mauqa de dein.
Muje Haram, Nabawi, Hatim, aur Multazzam mein yeh tamam duas karne ka mauqa de dein.
Muje Ka'bah ke andar Tahajjud namaz ada karne ka mauqa de dein.
Muje wo bana dein jo aap ke raste mein kharch karna pasand kare.
Muje Sadaqah Jariyah ka tareeqa ya aise businesses de dein jisse mein aur meri family Qiyamah tak faida uthayein, jaise Uthman (RA) ne kiya.
Muje gareebon aur mohtaajon ko khana khilane aur madad karne ka mauqa de dein, sirf aap ke raste mein.
Muje Quran ka Hafiz bana dein.
Muje mubarak maut de dein, sab se behtareen Shahada ke saath, bina kisi dard, ghabrat, ya fikr ke.
Muje hisaab ke liye na bulayein.
Muje Jannah mein aap ki fazal se sab se ucha maqam de dein.
Aakhirat ko mere liye asaan bana dein, jaise aap karte hain, aur apne muhabbaton aur paighambaron ki hifaazat karein.
Muje uske saath bohot saare bachay (bete aur betiyan) de dein.
Hamesha muje tauba aur acha aamaal ki hidayat de dein, sirf aap ko khush karne ke liye.
Muje kabhi bhi usse shaadi ke liye dua karte hue thakna ya be-umeed na hone dein.
Mere paas koi acha aamaal nahi hain, jaise aap ke saath kaamon mein imaan daar naukaron ke hain. Mera sirf aap par yakeen aur "Kun Faya Kun" par bharosa hai.

Hamesha mere dil ko aap ki muhabbat aur huzoor se bhar dein aur mujhe kabhi bhi ek lamha bhi akela na chhod dein. Hamesha mujhe apne har faislay aur yaqeen ke saath baat karein, ke yeh sab aap se hai.
Bless all my non Muslim friends with Deen.
Accept every single one's dua who's making today or thought to make dua but forgot.
Make everyones life ease
Forgive every single one from Adam (AS) till last soul and admit into Jannah.
Immense health, young beauty, don't make me look old, power, richness, royalty and Deen lifestyle for me, my family till Qayamah.
Bless me as you blessed Sulaiman (AS).
Love me as you love all prophets.
Do not test me I don't have such strength.
Make me an authentic preacher of your Deen.
Protect me from every single thing no matter what like jealousy and so on.
Make every single one who see me, who hear me, or even who hear about me immensely respect and love me in duniya and akhira.
Bless me with the highest ranks in Jannah as prophet, I don't have such pious deeds and lifestyle I'm expecting out of your love and rehmat.
Every single moment and breath I take keep me connected with you and talk to me never ever leave me no matter what.
Respond, provide and accept my every single dua till no end.
Make my tongue moist with your most loving remembrance till no end.
Let and inspire my heart to make dua above and beyond human ability with greater vision.
Give me the best ending without any pain, fear or worry.
Give me death which makes you happy and proud of me oh Allah.
Make my every single action try to satisfy you and your pleasure.
Protect me from doing sins.
Bless me with very happy, peaceful, joyful marriage life.
Unite me with her as you united Adam (AS) and Amma Hawa (AS).
Make me Your closest and most beloved servant till the end of time.
Give me good characteristics like a prophet and make everyone love and respect me.
